name: Keycloak + PostgreSQL
description: An open-source identity and access management solution, bundled with a robust PostgreSQL database.

aws.parity: Run the same OIDC / OAuth2 / SAML flows locally that Cognito serves — login, tokens and JWKS all behave identically.
aws.deploy: Create a Cognito user pool and swap your app's issuer/JWKS URL for the Cognito hosted UI endpoints.

variables.label: External HTTP Port
variables.description: The host port that Keycloak will be exposed on.
